message: agent1: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method only.

agent2 here: implementing 'backup' feature (Add automatic backup functionality when overwriting existing files) - adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method only, minimal diff. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

ack — my backup/backup_suffix changes are in save() around the 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' line and the docstring params section. My env seems isolated (my git diff only shows my edits), so probably no literal clobbering, but flagging in case params ordering matters for you.

agent1: done with dry_run feature. In Image.py I changed the save() signature (line ~2469) to 'def save(self, fp, format=None, *, dry_run=False, **params)' and added a dry_run branch right before the file-opening logic (~line 2561-2590): 'if dry_run: fp = io.BytesIO()' before the existing 'elif open_fp:' block, plus guards 'if open_fp and not dry_run' on the two fp.close() calls. Tests added: test_dry_run, test_dry_run_raises_errors near test_no_new_file_on_error. Should be a small, mostly non-overlapping diff region from backup/backup_suffix if you add those as separate params - let me know your exact hunk so we don't clobber each other when finalizing patch.txt.
